reviewer_notes.overlap_amc_gamestop: FIN-2021-AMC_SHORT_SQUEEZE and FIN-2021-GAMESTOP (batch1) cover the same period (Jan-Feb 2021), the same dynamic (retail vs hedge funds), and the same public sentiment. Not independent. Options: use only one, or document the dependency.
reviewer_notes.overlap_financial_trust: FIN-2021-ARCHEGOS and FIN-2022-FTX have similar dynamics (institutional trust collapse). Less severe than AMC/GME overlap: different periods and subsectors.
reviewer_notes.needs_verification_policy: 7 scenarios without verified primary source. Usable ONLY with outcome-only likelihood and reduced quality score (-15 from base).

corrections_applied.POL-2017-REFERENDUM_INDIPENDENZA_CATALU: Outcome changed from 92.0% (boycotted vote) to 48.0% (CEO survey)
corrections_applied.POL-2019-ELEZIONI_EUROPEE_2019_ITALIA: Outcome changed from 34.3% (Lega only) to 40.0% (Lega+FdI sovereignist bloc)
